publishedAbstract: * It is required obtain specific node resources and ODF info using OpenShift Prometheus REST API request. For example, the Prometheus query `instance:node_memory_utilisation:ratio{instance='odf1-snxb2-master-0'}` needs to be determined using the OpenShift Prometheus REST API.
publishedTitle: How to get specific node resources and ODF info using OpenShift Prometheus REST API request
